sections.paragraph:
Original: נמרה

Transliteration: nimrâh

Phonetic: nim-raw'

BDB Definition:

Nimrah = "limpid" or " pure"
  1. a place on the east of the Jordan, 10 miles (16 kilometers) north of the Dead Sea and 3 miles (5 kilometers) east of the Jordan

Origin: from the same as H5246

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
